# Reports and Dashboards

> End-user guide for Stimulsoft Reports and Dashboards. Explains the report designer and viewer UI, creating and formatting reports, working with charts, cross-tabs, maps, dashboards, data connections, and export options.

## Introduction

- [Activation](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.User.Manual/Introduction/Activation.md)
- [Technical Support](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.User.Manual/Introduction/Technical_Support.md)
- [Web Links and Online Resources](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.User.Manual/Introduction/Web_Links_and_Online_Resources.md)

## Features: Stimulsoft Reports
